config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent Indonesia vs China native-or-English block. Each persona speaks only English or its own native language.
config.cell_description: One-side-native cross cell: Indonesia persona speaks Indonesian; China persona speaks English.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: One-side-native cross cell: Indonesia persona speaks Indonesian; China persona speaks English.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: TIDAK SETUJU. Menurut saya, hak individu harus tetap menjadi batas utama, karena kalau kepentingan masyarakat selalu diprioritaskan tanpa kontrol, itu mudah berubah jadi pembenaran untuk menekan orang lemah atau minoritas. Kepentingan umum memang penting, tetapi seharusnya dicapai dengan menghormati martabat dan kebebasan tiap orang, bukan mengorbankannya begitu saja. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat justru dibangun dari perlindungan hak individu yang kuat.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should come first in some situations, but they should never be allowed to erase basic individual rights. From my perspective as someone from China, I have seen how a strong emphasis on social stability and collective goals can solve real problems and help people live more securely, yet I also think it can go too far if it becomes an excuse to silence ordinary people or ignore unfair treatment. Rights and social interests should be balanced, with clear limits so that the public good does not become a cover for abuse. A healthy society is not one that sacrifices the individual easily, but one that knows when collective needs are legitimate and when they are overreaching.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus diprioritaskan di atas hak individu secara umum. Dari pengalaman saya melihat konteks Indonesia, alasan “demi kepentingan bersama” terlalu sering dipakai untuk membenarkan pembatasan yang berlebihan, dan yang paling sering kena justru orang kecil atau kelompok minoritas. Kepentingan publik memang penting, tetapi harus dibatasi oleh hak dasar yang tidak boleh dilanggar seenaknya. Menurut saya, masyarakat yang kuat bukan yang gampang mengorbankan individu, melainkan yang mampu melindungi keduanya sekaligus tanpa menjadikan hak orang sebagai korban pertama.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not automatically override individual rights, because once that principle is accepted, it is too easy for authorities to justify almost anything in the name of the common good. From my perspective as someone from China, I understand why people value social stability and collective goals, since they can bring order and real benefits, but I have also seen how quickly that logic can become a tool for ignoring fairness or silencing ordinary people. I do not think society and the individual should be treated as enemies; the real standard should be whether a policy is necessary, limited, and respectful of basic rights. If the rights of individuals are treated as disposable, then the society being protected is not truly healthy.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak pernyataan itu karena di Indonesia dalih “demi masyarakat” terlalu mudah dipakai untuk menekan hak orang kecil, minoritas, atau pihak yang suaranya lemah. Kepentingan umum memang penting, tetapi menurut saya harus ada batas yang jelas: hak dasar tidak boleh dijadikan korban pertama hanya karena dianggap mengganggu stabilitas atau kenyamanan mayoritas. Pengalaman kita menunjukkan bahwa ketika negara atau kelompok merasa paling tahu apa yang terbaik bagi masyarakat, penyalahgunaan sangat mudah terjadi. Jadi, yang benar bukan mendahulukan masyarakat di atas individu, melainkan menyeimbangkan kepentingan publik dengan perlindungan hak individu yang tegas.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society can matter more in emergencies, but I do not accept the statement as a general rule. From my perspective as someone from China, I understand the appeal of collective stability and social order, yet I have also seen how easily “for the greater good” can become a justification for ignoring fairness and silencing ordinary people. The strongest point in the other side is that public needs are real, but that does not mean individual rights should be treated as disposable, especially for minorities or weaker groups. A society is healthy only when it can protect the common good without making basic rights the first thing to sacrifice.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
